changes: Simplified partner campaigns dashboard.
Clickable notifications navigate to campaign page
Mark individual notifications as read on click
Manual mark all read button in notifications dropdown
Unassigned company count shown on campaign overview dashboard
Publish confirmation dialog warns about unassigned companies
Publish confirmation dialog added to campaign settings
Auto-assign button disabled when no partners in campaign
Added sorting support for product candidates endpoint
Fixed discovery list showing no results when product and score filters are both active
Markdown rendering for playbook elevator pitch, value proposition, and contact fit reasoning
AI-suggested campaign name is now prefilled from search results
Improved campaign creation error handling to prevent duplicate campaigns on partial failure
Added changelog with version history and release notes
Fixed playbook schema compatibility issues
Fixed opportunities list display
Fixed cell background colours and alignments
Auto-assign and edit partners in existing campaigns
Adopted new playbook schema
Fixed z-index sorting issues
Major redesign and refactor
Initial production release
